commit.message:
Fix artifact content overflow in session detail (#194)

## Summary
- Add `overflow-hidden` to `ScrollArea` in `ArtifactContent` so
`max-h-[300px]` properly clips content within the Radix UI viewport,
preventing expanded artifact text from overlapping the next artifact
header

## Test plan
- [ ] Open a session with multiple artifacts
- [ ] Expand an artifact with long content
- [ ] Verify content scrolls within its 300px container and does not
overlap the next artifact header

commit.message:
Use rewrite instead of redirect for maintenance mode so page shows at root URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix session status not updating in project session list (#193)

## Summary
- Terminal SSE events (`session_completed`, `session_failed`,
`session_stopped`) were published without `project_id`, so the
frontend's `useGlobalSSE` hook could not invalidate the project-specific
session query cache (`["projects", id, "sessions"]`)
- Added `project_id` to `resolve_session_dir` return value,
`_publish_terminal` helper, and all `SessionEvent` publishes in the
`stop_session` endpoint
- Updated all call sites in `logs.py`, `sse.py`, and `sessions.py`
routers to unpack the new 3-tuple

## Test plan
- [ ] Launch a session from a project, wait for it to complete — verify
the project session list updates status without manual refresh
- [ ] Stop a running session — verify the project session list reflects
"stopped" status
- [ ] Check the Dashboard (global session list) still updates correctly
- [ ] Verify SSE events in browser devtools include `project_id` for all
lifecycle events

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix live data: use REST eval API instead of view.evalAsync

SkySpark pub UI does not expose view.evalAsync. Switch to the same
pattern used by earlhamHWTable: extract attestKey and projectName from
view.session(), then POST to /api/{project}/eval with a Zinc body.

- Update evals/loadProjects.js to accept (attestKey, projectName)

- Update skySpark_setupTrackerUI.js to load api.js before evals

commit.message:
Standardise license setup: MPL-2.0 + PMPL-1.0-or-later (REUSE)

- LICENSE: pure MPL-2.0 text for machine detection (GitHub, registries)
- LICENSES/MPL-2.0.txt: standard MPL-2.0 text
- LICENSES/PMPL-1.0-or-later.txt: Palimpsest License text
- NOTICE: explains the dual-license relationship
- Source SPDX headers remain PMPL-1.0-or-later

This ensures OSI compliance checks pass while preserving PMPL as
the governing license for source code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- 探索异步传输模式（ATM）的兴衰史

fix(site): markdown toggle collecting empty pageBody array

The #md-overlay div sits immediately after </nav>, so
nav.nextElementSibling === overlay. The while loop condition
`el !== overlay` caused immediate exit, leaving pageBody empty
and producing a blank codeblock. Fix: skip overlay inside the
loop instead of using it as a termination condition.

Fix mixed-content offline issue via server-side proxy routes

Browser was blocked from calling HTTP AzuraCast from the HTTPS site.
Added /api/nowplaying and /api/sse proxy routes that run server-side,
so all AzuraCast traffic stays HTTP→HTTP (server to AzuraCast) while
the browser only ever sees HTTPS same-origin requests.

commit.message:
feat(docstore): 4가지 텍스트 청크 분할 전략 구현

context:
* AI 보조 코딩으로 구현됨
* lib/text-splitters.js 신규 생성 (4가지 전략 엔진)
* sentence: 기존 문장 단위 분할 (기본값)
* recursive: LangChain 스타일 재귀적 문자 분할 (문단→줄→문장→단어 계층)
* law-article: 법령 제N조/항/호 단위 분할 (조문 제목 자동 접두사)
* semantic: Gemini Flash 기반 AI 의미 단위 분할 (명시적 선택 시에만 실행)
* embeddings.js에 smartChunk 디스패처 연동
* upload.js에서 chunkStrategy 파라미터 수신 및 전달
* law-import.js는 자동으로 law-article 전략 사용
* index.html 업로드 탭에 전략 선택 드롭다운 UI 추가

verify:
* 4가지 분할 전략 단위 테스트 통과 (node -e 실행)
* 법령 텍스트 제1조/제2조/제3조 정상 분리 확인
* 전체 파일 문법 검증 통과 (node --check)

ai-role: implementation

feat: Add ipcping utility and fix overeager path resolution

services via nameserver lookup. Only resolve shell arguments as paths
for file commands (cat, ls) or tokens containing path indicators
(. or /), so service names like "nameserver" pass through unchanged.

commit.message:
feat: bump API spec to v0.6.6 (#88)

## Summary

- **Word-level timestamps**: Added `include_word_timestamps` query
parameter to transcription and describe endpoints, with a new
`WordTimestamp` schema and `words` array on `SpeechOutputPart` for
word-level `start_time`/`end_time` (not available for YouTube sources,
JSON format only)
- **Chapters & shots**: Added `include_chapters` and `include_shots`
query parameters to segmentation and describe endpoints, with
corresponding `chapters`, `shots`, `total_chapters`, and `total_shots`
response fields for narrative chapters and shot-detector boundaries
- **Default value cleanup**: Removed explicit `default` values from
query parameters and schema properties across all endpoints (pagination
`limit`/`offset`, `sort_by`/`sort_order`, `response_format`, boolean
flags like `include_data`, `background`, `stream`, entity config
booleans, modality toggles, frame extraction config, etc.) so that
server-side defaults are authoritative and the spec doesn't risk going
out of sync

### Version
`0.6.5` → `0.6.6`


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai
-->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

## Release Notes

* **New Features**
* Added word-level timing information for transcripts and descriptions
using the new `include_word_timestamps` parameter (not available for
YouTube sources)
* Introduced narrative chapter segments with the `include_chapters`
parameter
  * Added shot boundary detection via the `include_shots` parameter

* **Other Changes**
  * API version updated to 0.6.6
  * Default parameter values removed from API specifications

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  so --install registers hooks for fresh users
- Piped mode caches session_id from status JSON, providing a reliable second

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial HandyQwen release

Fork of Handy (https://handy.computer) focused on Qwen3-ASR for
multilingual voice input on Apple Silicon Macs. Supports Chinese,
English, Japanese, Korean and Chinese-English code-switching — all
local, free, no subscription required.

Key additions over upstream Handy:
- Qwen3-ASR 0.6B and 1.7B (8-bit quantized) as featured models
- Automated Python env setup via uv + mlx-qwen3-asr install
- HuggingFace weight download + on-device 8-bit quantization pipeline
- Persistent Python daemon process for fast repeated inference
- Rebranded UI: HandyQwen identity, updated About page with acks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
